title.ko: 힘, 토오크, 일, 기계적 동력, 기계적 효율 또는 유체압력의 측정 (무게측정 G01G)
title.en: MEASURING FORCE, STRESS, TORQUE, WORK, MECHANICAL POWER, MECHANICAL EFFICIENCY, OR FLUID PRESSURE (weighing G01G)

definition.ko: 힘, 토오크, 일, 기계적 동력, 기계적 효율의 측정 일반적 방법; 특정의 목적에 적합한 장치 G01L1/00, G01L3/00; G01L5/00 유체압력 측정 측정방법 G01L7/00, G01L9/00, G01L11/00 압력차 또는 복수압력의 측정 G01L13/00, G01L15/00 장치의 세부 또는 부속품 G01L19/00 특정목적의 측정 장치 팽창체 내부압력의 측정 G01L17/00 진공계 G01L21/00 빠른 변화의 지시, 특히 동작중의 유체압력 엔진 G01L23/00 시험 및 교정 G01L25/00, G01L27/00

title.ko: 힘 또는 응력의 측정일반 (충격에 의한 힘의 측정 G01L5/00)
title.en: Measuring force or stress, in general (measuring force due to impact G01L0005000000)
by hydraulic or pneumatic means
by measuring elastic deformation of gauges, e.g. of springs
by measuring the permanent deformation of gauges, e.g. of compressed bodies
by the use of counterbalancing forces

title.ko: 압력을 가한 진동소자, 예. 현의 주파수 변동을 이용한 측정(저항 스트레인게이지를 사용하는 것 G01L 1/22)
title.en: by measuring variations of frequency of stressed vibrating elements, e.g. of stressed strings (using resistance strain gauges G01L0001220000)
by measuring variations in the magnetic properties of materials resulting from the application of stress
by measuring variations in capacitance or inductance of electrical elements, e.g. by measuring variations of frequency of electrical oscillators
using properties of piezoelectric devices
using properties of piezo-resistive materials, i.e. materials of which the ohmic resistance varies according to changes in magnitude or direction of force applied to the material

title.ko: 고체물질 또는 도전성유체의 옴저항 변화의 측정에 의한 것(압전저 항물질의 옴저항의 변화를 측정하는 것 G01L 1/18) 동전 셀(electrokinetic cell) 즉 응력의 인가에 의해 압력이 유기 또는 변화하는 액체함유 셀(liquid containing cell)을 이용하는 것
title.en: by measuring variations in ohmic resistance of solid materials or of electrically-conductive fluids (of piezo-resistive materials G01L0001180000); by making use of electrokinetic cells, i.e. liquid-containing cells wherein an electrical potential is produced or varied upon the application of stress
using resistance strain gauges
by measuring variations of optical properties of material when it is stressed, e.g. by photoelastic stress analysis

title.ko: 파동성 또는 입자성 방사선, 예. X선 , 중성자를 사용하는 것(G01L 1/24가 우선)
title.en: using wave or particle radiation, e.g. X-rays, neutrons (G01L0001240000 takes precedence)
Auxiliary measures taken, or devices used, in connection with the measurement of force, e.g. for preventing influence of transverse components of force, for preventing overload
Measuring torque, work, mechanical power, or mechanical efficiency, in general
Rotary-transmission dynamometers
wherein the torque-transmitting element comprises a torsionally-flexible shaft
involving mechanical means for indicating
involving optical means for indicating
involving electric or magnetic means for indicating
involving photoelectric means
wherein the torque-transmitting element is other than a torsionally-flexible shaft
Rotary-absorption dynamometers, e.g. of brake type
mechanically actuated
fluid actuated
electrically or magnetically actuated

Devices for determining the value of power, e.g. by measuring and simultaneously multiplying the values of torque and revolutions per unit of time, by multiplying the values of tractive or propulsive force and velocity
Devices for measuring efficiency, i.e. the ratio of power output to power input

title.ko: 특정의 목적에 특히 적합하도록 힘, 일(work), 기계적 동력 또는 토크를 측정하는 장치 또는 방법
title.en: Apparatus for, or methods of, measuring force, work, mechanical power, or torque, specially adapted for specific purposes
for measuring release force of ski safety bindings
for measuring tension in flexible members, e.g. ropes, cables, wires, threads, belts or bands
using mechanical means
using fluid means
using electrical means
using sensors inserted into the flexible member
using sensors located at a non-interrupted part of the flexible member
using sensors fixed at one end of the flexible member
using electro-optical means
for measuring a reaction force applied on a cantilever beam
for measuring a reaction force applied on an element disposed between two supports, e.g. on a plurality of rollers or gliders
for measuring a reaction force applied on a single support, e.g. a glider
for measuring axial thrust in a rotary shaft, e.g. of propulsion plants
for measuring the tractive or propulsive power of vehicles
for measuring the force of explosions; for measuring the energy of projectiles

title.ko: 힘의 복수 분력(分力)을 측정하는 것
title.en: for measuring several components of force
using variations in ohmic resistance
of piezoresistors

title.ko: 압력 감지 도체인 것 (압저항을 사용하는 것 G01L5/162)
title.en: of pressure sensitive conductors (using piezoresistors G01L0005162000)

title.ko: 변형계(Strain Gauge)인 것 (압저항을 사용하는 것 G01L5/162)
title.en: of strain gauges (using piezoresistors G01L0005162000)
of potentiometers
using variations in inductance
using variations in capacitance
using photoelectric means
using piezoelectric means
using counterbalancing forces
using magnetic means
using fluid means
using acoustic means
for measuring ratios of force
for measuring wheel side-thrust
for measuring the force applied to control members, e.g. control members of vehicles, triggers
for determining value of torque or twisting moment for tightening a nut or other member which is similarly stressed
for determining the characteristic of torque in relation to revolutions per unit of time
for testing brakes

title.ko: 기계적 또는 유체 압력 감지 요소에 의한 유체 또는 유동성 고체 물질의 정상압 또는 준정상압 측정 (전기적 또는 자기적 수단에 의한 기계적 압력 감지 요소의 변위를 전송 또는 표시 G01L9/00, 2 또는 그 이상의 압력값의 차이 측정 G01L13/00, 2 또는 그 이상의 압력값을 동시에 측정 G01L15/00)
title.en: Measuring fluid pressure

title.ko: 기계적 또는 유체 압력 감지 요소에 의한 유체 또는 유동성 고체 물질의 정상압 또는 준정상압 측정 (전기적 또는 자기적 수단에 의한 기계적 압력 감지 요소의 변위를 전송 또는 표시 G01L9/00, 2 또는 그 이상의 압력값의 차이 측정 G01L13/00, 2 또는 그 이상의 압력값을 동시에 측정 G01L15/00)
title.en: Measuring the steady or quasi-steady pressure of a fluid or a fluent solid material by mechanical or fluid pressure-sensitive elements (transmitting or indicating the displacement of mechanical pressure-sensitive elements by electric or magnetic means G01L0009000000;measuring differences of two or more pressure values G01L0013000000;measuring two or more pressure values simultaneously G01L0015000000)
in the form of elastically-deformable gauges
in the form of flexible, deformable tubes, e.g. Bourdon gauges
of the bellows type
of the flexible-diaphragm type
of the capsule type
with exhausted chamber; Aneroid barometers
with zero-setting means
in the form of pistons
using liquid as the pressure-sensitive medium, e.g. liquid-column gauges
involving a closed chamber above the liquid level, the chamber being exhausted or housing low-pressure gas; Liquid barometers
involving floats, e.g. floating bells
involving balances in the form of rings partly filled with liquid

title.ko: 전기 또는 자기 압력 감지 요소에 의한 유체 또는 유동성 고체의 정상압 또는 준정상압 측정; 유체 또는 유동성 고체의 정상 또는 준정상 압력을 측정하는 데 사용되는 기계적 압력 감지 요소의 변위를 전기 또는 자기 수단으로 전달 또는 지시 (2 또는 그 이상의 압력값의 차이 측정 G01L13/00; 2 또는 그 이상의 압력값을 동시에 측정 G01L15/00)
title.en: Measuring steady or quasi-steady pressure of a fluid or a fluent solid material by electric or magnetic pressure-sensitive elements; Transmitting or indicating the displacement of mechanical pressure-sensitive elements, used to measure the steady or quasi-steady pressure of a fluid or fluent solid material, by electric or magnetic means (measuring differences of two or more pressure values G01L0013000000;measuring two or more pressure values simultaneously G01L0015000000)
by making use of variations in ohmic resistance, e.g. of potentiometers
of resistance strain gauges
of piezo-resistive devices
by making use of piezoelectric devices
by making use of variations in inductance
by making use of variations in capacitance
involving the displacement of magnets, e.g. electromagnets
by making use of variations in the magnetic properties of material resulting from the application of stress
by making use of electrokinetic cells, i.e. liquid-containing cells wherein an electric potential is produced or varied upon the application of stress

title.ko: 그룹 G01L 7/00 또는 G01L 9/00 포함되지 않는 수단에 의한 유체 또는 유동성 고체의 정상압 또는 준 정상압의 측정,
title.en: Measuring steady or quasi-steady pressure of a fluid or a fluent solid material by means not provided for in group G01L0007000000 or G01L0009000000
by optical means
by acoustic means
Ultrasonic means
Devices or apparatus for measuring differences of two or more fluid pressure values
using elastically-deformable members or pistons as sensing elements
using floats or liquids as sensing elements
using electric or magnetic pressure-sensitive elements
Devices or apparatus for measuring two or more fluid pressure values simultaneously
Devices or apparatus for measuring tyre pressure or the pressure in other inflated bodies

title.ko: 유동체의 정상압 또는 준정상압 측정장치의 세부 또는 부속품으로서 특정형식의 압력계에 한정되지 않은 것
title.en: Details of, or accessories for, apparatus for measuring steady or quasi-steady pressure of a fluent medium insofar as such details or accessories are not special to particular types of pressure gauges

title.ko: 측정장치의 경사 또는 가속도의 영향을 방지 또는 보상하는 장치; 영점조정 수단(아네로이드(aneroid) 기압계용 G01L 7/14)
title.en: Arrangements for preventing, or for compensating for, effects of inclination or acceleration of the measuring device; Zero-setting means (for aneroid barometers G01L0007140000)
Means for compensating for effects of changes of temperature
Means for preventing overload or deleterious influence of the measured medium on the measuring device or vice versa
Means for indicating or recording, e.g. for remote indication
mechanical
Alarms or signals
Housings
Dials; Mounting of dials
Vacuum gauges
having a compression chamber in which gas, whose pressure is to be measured, is compressed
wherein the chamber is closed by liquid; Vacuum gauges of the McLeod type
actuated by rotating or inverting the measuring device
by measuring variations in the transmission of acoustic waves through the medium, the pressure of which is to be measured
by measuring variations in the heat conductivity of the medium, the pressure of which is to be measured
measuring changes in electric resistance of measuring members, e.g. of filaments; Vacuum gauges of the Pirani type
using thermocouples
by measuring variation of frictional resistance of gases
using a pendulum
using members oscillating about a vertical axis
using resonance effects of a vibrating body; Vacuum gauges of the Klumb type
using rotating members; Vacuum gauges of the Langmuir type
by making use of radiometer action, i.e. of the pressure caused by the momentum of molecules passing from a hotter to a cooler member; Vacuum gauges of the Knudsen type
using torsional rotary measuring members
by making use of ionisation effects
using electric discharge tubes with thermionic cathodes
using electric discharge tubes with cold cathodes
using radioactive substances

Devices or apparatus for measuring or indicating or recording rapid changes, such as oscillations, in the pressure of steam, gas, or liquid; Indicators for determining work or energy of steam, internal-combustion, or other fluid-pressure engines from the condition of the working fluid
mechanically indicating or recording and involving loaded or return springs
involving means subjected to known counteracting pressure
Indicating or recording by optical means
operated electrically
by pressure-sensitive members of the piezoelectric type
by changing capacitance or inductance
by electromagnetic elements
by photoelectric means
by resistance strain gauges
combined with planimeters or integrators
for detecting or indicating knocks in internal-combustion engines; Units comprising pressure-sensitive members combined with ignitors for firing internal-combustion engines
for measuring pressure in inlet or exhaust ducts of internal-combustion engines
Details or accessories
Cooling means
Means for indicating consecutively positions of pistons or cranks of internal-combustion engines in combination with pressure indicators
Apparatus specially adapted for recording pressure changes measured by indicators
Testing or calibrating of apparatus for measuring force, torque, work, mechanical power, or mechanical efficiency
Testing or calibrating of apparatus for measuring fluid pressure
of indicators
